MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (RAILWAY BOARD) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st July, 2019 G.S.R. 546(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (c), (e), (f) and (g) of sub-section (2) of section 30 of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, namely :- 1. Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2019. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, in Schedule 1, for serial number 11 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely : - () (2) (3) “11. Gorakhpur Districts of Gorakhpur, Deoria, Ballia, Gazipur, Azamgarh, Mau, Basti, Siddharthanagar, Mirzapur, Robertsganj, Jaunpur, Faizabad, Gonda, Bahraich, Varanasi, Maharajganj, Kushinagar, Shravasti, Sant Kabir Nagar, Chandauli, Sant Ravi Das Nagar, Balrampur, Ambedkar Nagar, Allahabad,and Kaushambi of the State of Uttar Pradesh.” [F. No. 2016/TC(RCT)/1-13] VIVEK SRIVASTAVA, Executive Director (Public Grievances) -- 2 of 3 -- [aM 1I-wVS 3(i)] YR AT USTIA + STATA 3 Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (1), vide notification number G.S.R. 842(E), dated the 19" September, 1989 and subsequently amended as follows:- 1. eo en nrw FY DY DO ea a eee eee CD Om N DN FSF YH NY FS G.S.R. 700 (E), dated the 26" November, 1991; G.S.R. 438 (E), dated the 28" April, 1992; G.S.R. 509 (E), dated the 15" June, 1994; G.S.R. 270 (E), dated the 8" July, 1996; G.S.R. 59 (BE), dated the 6” February, 1997; G.S.R. 719 (E), dated the 26" October, 1999; G.S.R. 167 (E), dated the 29% February, 2000; G.S.R. 513 (BE), dated the 9" July, 2001; G.S.R. 787 (E), dated the 2nd December, 2002; G.S.R. 384 (E), dated the 1“ November, 2003; G.S.R. 66 (E), dated the 16" February, 2006; G.S.R. 498(E), dated the 23™ August, 2006; G.S.R. 283(E), dated the 11 April, 2007; G.S.R. 96(E), dated the 29" February, 2010; G.S.R.711(E), dated the 17" September, 2015; G.S.R. 464(E), dated the 28" April, 2016; G.S.R. 332(E), dated the 50 April, 2017; G.S.R. 1060(E), dated the 23" August, 2017; G.S.R. 816(E), dated the 28" August, 2018; and G.S.R. 1136(E), dated the 26" November, 2018.
